channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Secret Service Kills Armed Man Who Breached Mar-a-Lago Security Perimeter Overnight: Officials
item.description: Donald and Melania Trump were at the White House at the time of the incident

item.title: Steve Irwin's Family Remembers Him on Would-Be 64th Birthday with Throwback Photos: 'Thank You for Being a Guiding Light'
item.description: This year marks two decades since the Australian conservationist died in 2006

item.title: All About Jackie Kennedy's Toi et Moi Engagement Ring from JFK (Which Featured an Emerald and Multiple Diamonds!)
item.description: Jackie Kennedy redesigned her engagement ring in 1962 after JFK took office

item.title: Stella McCartney Says the Bullying Mom Linda Faced in Band Wings 'Breaks My Heart': 'I Knew She Hurt'
item.description: Stella opens up about her mom's career in the Prime Video documentary 'Paul McCartney: Man on the Run'

item.title: Where Is the Cast of “What I Like About You” Now? See What Happened to the Stars 20 Years After the Sitcom Was Canceled
item.description: 'What I Like About You' ran from 2003 to 2006 for four seasons

item.title: Ex-Prince Andrew Could Be Removed From Line of Royal Succession
item.description: The hits just keep coming for former Prince Andrew … In his latest public shaming, the British government is reportedly considering erasing him from t...

item.title: Shia LaBeouf Kisses Mystery Woman After Mia Goth Split
item.description: Shia LaBeouf is back in the dating game ... and he's playing it out in public nearly a year after his split from Mia Goth. TMZ has obtained video and ...

item.title: Man Shot and Killed by Secret Service At President Trump's Mar-a-Lago
item.description: A man in his early 20s was shot and killed by U.S. Secret Service agents after breaching the secure perimeter at President Donald Trump's Mar-a-Lago p...

item.title: Vikings' WR Rondale Moore Died From Suspected Self-Inflicted Gunshot Wound
item.description: Rondale Moore died from a suspected self-inflicted gunshot wound ... TMZ Sports has confirmed. Chief Todd Bailey of the New Albany, IN Police Departme...

item.title: Hailey Bieber Donates $20K to Eric Dane's GoFundMe After ALS Death
item.description: Hollywood continues to rally around Eric Dane's family in a major way following his death and Hailey Bieber just made one of the biggest moves. The mo...
